message:
feat(core): add DAG-aware bead readiness resolution and detailed issue API

Extends the beads integration layer with dependency graph analysis and
detailed issue loading:

beads_types.rs (+412 lines):
- BeadIssueDetail: full issue snapshot from `br show --json` including
  dependencies, dependents, labels, assignee, description, and timestamps
- BeadDependencyRef: edge type with blocks_readiness() logic that treats
  parent-child as taxonomy (non-blocking) vs hard dependencies (blocking)
- resolve_bead_readiness(): DAG-aware readiness resolver that performs
  topological analysis, detects cycles (Kahn's algorithm), identifies
  missing dependency nodes, and classifies each bead as ready/blocked/done
- BeadReadinessReport: aggregated report with ready/blocked/done lists
  and degraded-mode reason codes (MissingDependencyNode, CyclicDependencyGraph,
  PartialGraphData)
- BeadResolverReasonCode enum for structured error reporting

beads_bridge.rs (+144 lines):
- list_all_with_closed(): list all beads including closed items via
  `br list --all --limit 0 --json` with fail-open degradation
- list_all_details(): load detailed issue records for every known bead,
  falling back to degraded records when `br show` fails for individual items
- readiness_report(): end-to-end pipeline that loads all details and
  runs the DAG readiness resolver, returning a BeadReadinessReport

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
